explanation:
You have been provided with a complete directory of files packed into a single XML format for context.
The input is structured as follows: - `directory_structure`: A visual tree representing the file system hierarchy. - `files`: A collection of `file path="path/to/file"` tags containing the actual text content of the files.
**NO XML IN OUTPUT**: Do not use the `file` or `directory_structure` XML tags in your response. Those are strictly for input data transport.
directory_structure:
Root: ~/dev/vellum
nix/ flake.nix mock.album.nix python/ loose_scripts/ clean_lyrics_headers.py fetch_lyrics.py migrate_mbids.py strip_flac_id3.py config.py rust/ libvellum/ src/ compiler/ manifest.rs mod.rs validation.rs images/ cover_palette/ kmeans.rs kmeansn.rs kmeansnd.rs kmeansnh.rs kmeansnv.rs mean_shift.rs mod.rs cover_chroma.rs cover_entropy.rs mod.rs config.rs error.rs harvest.rs lib.rs models.rs scanner.rs sentinel.rs sql.rs utils.rs Cargo.toml vellum/ src/ compile/ builder/ assets.rs context.rs mod.rs engine/ mod.rs stream.rs verify.rs resolvers/ cover_palette.rs mod.rs native.rs standard.rs mod.rs harvest/ mod.rs manifest/ compressor.rs engine.rs grouper.rs mod.rs nix/ build/ mod.rs get/ mod.rs manifest/ globbing.rs mod.rs mod.rs query/ mod.rs run/ get_cover_palette.rs get_lyrics.rs mod.rs server/ api/ assets.rs mod.rs playback.rs system.rs websocket.rs library/ mod.rs scanner.rs mpd/ actor.rs commands.rs mod.rs status.rs query/ logic.toml mod.rs watchdog/ mod.rs mod.rs state.rs update/ mod.rs main.rs Cargo.toml Cargo.toml deny.toml rustfmt.toml web-app/ src/ modules/ HomeView/ AlbumGrid/ Album.svelte AlbumGrid.svelte GridController.svelte.ts Layout.svelte.ts Scroll.svelte.ts ModalDrawer/ ModalDrawer.svelte ModalDrawerTracks.svelte HomeView.svelte Sidebar.svelte SidebarIndex.svelte NavigationBar/ Control.svelte NavBar.svelte NavButton.svelte QueueView/ BackgroundShader.svelte ControlPanel.svelte CoverPanel.svelte LyricsPanel.svelte QueueView.svelte Sidebar.svelte TracklistPanel.svelte ShelvesView/ ShelvesView.svelte Sidebar.svelte ClearCover.svelte player.svelte.ts api.ts app.css App.svelte library.svelte.ts main.ts navigation.svelte.ts theme.svelte.ts eslint.config.js index.html package.json stylelint.config.js svelte.config.js tsconfig.json vite.config.js .gitignore flake.nix
